problem id: 5dec898e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  11100000 -> 00011100
  10000000 -> 00010000
  01101110 -> 11101101
  01100011 -> 00111100
  10011000 -> 10010011
  00000011 -> 00110000
  11101001 -> 10001101
  00011011 -> 10110011
  10100100 -> 01010100
  10101101 -> 11000101

query: 10101100
predicted answer: 11010101
